bullet_changes.original_text: Conducted structured analysis of model behavior and research findings, strengthening quantitative reasoning, documentation, and insight communication skills.
bullet_changes.revised_text: Analyzed model behavior using C/C++ and Windows socket programming, enhancing quantitative reasoning and documentation skills.

bullet_changes.original_text: Compared CNN and Vision Transformer architectures to identify performance tradeoffs, application-specific strengths, and practical considerations for real-world use.
bullet_changes.revised_text: Compared CNN and Vision Transformer architectures using Java, identifying performance tradeoffs and application-specific strengths.

bullet_changes.original_text: Published a research article, “The Role of AI-Enhanced Medical Computer Vision in Diagnostic Automation,” analyzing how CNNs and Vision Transformers enable diagnostic automation in medical imaging.
bullet_changes.revised_text: Published a research article analyzing the role of AI-enhanced medical computer vision in diagnostic automation.

bullet_changes.original_text: Translated findings into stakeholder-ready summaries and a SWOT/strategy brief linking ML capabilities to product risk and innovation priorities.
bullet_changes.revised_text: Translated findings into stakeholder-ready summaries, linking ML capabilities to product risk and innovation priorities.

bullet_changes.original_text: Built and evaluated ML workflows in Python using the TensorFlow framework on large-scale datasets to support fraud detection model iteration and threshold tuning, improving recall by 3.6% at a fixed false positive rate.
bullet_changes.revised_text: Built and evaluated ML workflows in Python using TensorFlow, improving recall by 3.6% at a fixed false positive rate.

bullet_changes.original_text: Explored patterns and anomalies in high-volume transaction data to identify predictive signals and improve model performance.
bullet_changes.revised_text: Explored patterns and anomalies in high-volume transaction data to identify predictive signals and improve model performance.
